case_title: HUMBERTO D. RUIZ et al VS. PHILLIP GOLDSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, HUMBERTO D. RUIZ, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSTEIN, PHILLIP TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC. DOES 1 THRU 50, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-28-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-13-2009
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-21-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GUADALUPE RUIZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-21-2009 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-05-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST HUMBERTO D. RUIZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-21-2009 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-28-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-28-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST HUMBERTO D. RUIZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-19-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-03-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2009 CONTINUED TO DEC-21-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-21-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-21-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-21-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona Humberto Ruiz is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/21/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-19-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs in Propria Persona are sanctioned $200.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. (212)
